milestones.title: Challenge kickoff
milestones.description: Internet pioneer Vint Cerf asked what desirable properties a new Coordination Layer above today's Web should possess–launching the Meta-Layer Initiative's global inquiry.

milestones.title: First Call for Input
milestones.description: Communities through People Centered Internet, Bridgit.io, and aligned partners submitted ideas, concerns, and aspirations for the future of the Internet.

milestones.title: The Metaweb book
milestones.description: Publication of The Metaweb–a foundational narrative on the layered Web, collective intelligence, and the path toward a community-governed coordination layer.

milestones.title: Meta-Layer Initiative website
milestones.description: Launch of the public Meta-Layer Initiative site to broaden participation and surface the growing body of research and community work.

milestones.title: Second Call for Input
milestones.description: A broader public call gathered submissions from around the world. Contributions were preserved as Bitcoin Ordinal inscriptions–a permanent record of community thinking.

milestones.title: Version 0.77 public review
milestones.description: The current working draft–Desirable Properties of a Meta-Layer v0.77–is open for public review, informed by two calls for input and AI-assisted synthesis under community stewardship.

milestones.title: Workgroup formation
milestones.description: Formation of workgroups for each Desirable Property–recruiting leads, co-leads, and contributors to steward individual chapters through the next phase.

milestones.title: Community review & patches
milestones.description: Workgroups gather commentary, propose patches, and explore implementations that strengthen the coherence of the emerging framework.

milestones.title: Version 1 synthesis
milestones.description: Synthesis of Version 1 of the Desirable Properties of a Meta-Layer–the first mature community-developed edition advancing toward rough consensus.

milestones.title: Desirable Properties Book & Monument launch
milestones.description: Launch of the online Desirable Properties book and permanent Ordinal edition–preserving the first mature community-developed version as part of the Digital Monument.

milestones.title: Meta-Layer Summit
milestones.description: Join everyone committed to building a more trustworthy Internet, including system thinkers, community organizers, civic innovators, researchers, and prosocial technologists. Explore the ideas, technologies, and collaborations shaping the Meta-Layer, a new civic infrastructure for trust, context, and human agency in the age of AI. Help shape the future of the Internet with people working across technology, governance, and civil society.
